BKN.headline: Green makes 11 3-pointers to set Bucks' single-game record in 125-108 win over Nets
BKN.description: — AJ Green made 11 3-pointers to set the Milwaukee Bucks' single-game record and scored a career-high 35 points in a 125-108 victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Friday night.

BKN.headline: Brooklyn faces Milwaukee, aims to break road skid
BKN.description: Brooklyn Nets (20-60, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Milwaukee Bucks (31-49, 11th in the Eastern Conference)

TOR.headline: Brooklyn faces Toronto, aims to stop road slide
TOR.description: Brooklyn Nets (20-61, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Toronto Raptors (45-36, sixth in the Eastern Conference)

TOR.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
TOR.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

TOR.headline: Knicks beat Raptors for 13th straight time and wrap up No. 3 seed in the Eastern Conference
TOR.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 29 points, Karl-Anthony Towns finished with 22 points and 10 rebounds, and the New York Knicks clinched the No. 3 seed in the Eastern Conference with their 13th consecutive victory over the Toronto Raptors, 112-95 on Friday night.
